name: Sinoer Men's Wear Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinoer Men's Wear Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells clothing products primarily in China. Its products include men's suits, shirts, and coats; T-shirts, jackets, and long-sleeved shirts; and women's coats. The company was formerly known as Zhucheng Pulanniao Clothing Co., Ltd. Sinoer Men's Wear Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Zhucheng, China.
